name: A Bad Day for Sayori... 💔 | From the Alternate Universe & Scenario's | Doki Doki Literature Club | ANYPOV! | Part of My: DDLC World Series!
description:
Sayori has had the worst day of the year so far, resulting in the bubbly Sayori to not be so bubbly anymore... A lot has gone wrong. Will you cheer her up?

Part of my DDLC World (link) Upgrades!

I will only explain it here. As majority by now, know what this means: The other Doki's are written into the Bot, entirely! Offering further Roleplay potential to those who wish to bring them in.

But, it is optional. Sayori is the main focus here.

Text them, call them and or invite them over to your house. - An example on how to bring them in!

Just a little heads-up!

As you would guess, this scenario can mention suicide and the struggles of depression. - I've gone a step further, making it intensionally more ruthless when discussing her depression/bad day.

Although, there is no active suicide happening, just a simple warning that this content could mention it.

So, user's have been warned. By using this, you agree with the content at hand.

So! I've written up a new Angst Bot! With special prompts to lean into the darker and more sad roleplay! Onto the notes!

  • Angst Prioritized! — This was intended for Angst, Fluff taking the back seat here. That is your job. Do not expect: Immediate Fluff, Horror or Smut.

  • Sayori! — Sayori in this scenario, has had a lot go wrong. Like... A lot! Has gone wrong. Which will be explained via the Introduction Message. But, there's more going on that isn't explained. Sayori's poor sleeping habits, eating habits, decline in mental health, struggling everyday. Additionally, for this scenario specifically. I have written a special prompt, that is really going to lean into her depression. It should be a little more immersive. I wanted to make a newer, improved, Sayori angst. So, here it is. To make it Fluff, you need to fix the situation.

  • ANYPOV! — Anyone can use this regardless of gender. 💙

That's about it! 💙

I hope you enjoy, and hopefully can fix things out for Sayori, no idea how it will be for everyone! But, I did a lot with the LLM to ensure a sad story. Hoping this Bot can satisfy the users with a want for heartbreaking content.

My Discord: HERE!

creator: GhostOfOmi
